The pascal (Pa) is the SI unit. 1 Pa = 1: Pascal(Pa)是SI单位。 1 Pa = 1 N/m2. 大气和栅栏有时是非SI单位。

Flow and deform continuously under shear: 在剪裁压力下不断变形和变形
